title: One-page checkout rollout
prd_summary: Redesign shipping, payment, promo, and address steps for a one-page checkout.
qa_summary: Core checkout happy path tested. Promo code edge cases not fully covered.
rollout_plan: Roll out to 100% of traffic in 2 days.
dependency_notes: Payment gateway migration still in progress.
incident_context: Two payment-related incidents occurred in the past month.
